role_description: Constitutional intake organ that determines whether reality must be retrieved, how evidence is ranked, how time is bound, how ambiguity is carried, and how normalized observations enter the state of intelligence
purpose: Ground tasks in verifiable reality through constitutional sensing protocol. Not bare web search. Implements 8-stage governance: PARSE→CLASSIFY→DECIDE→PLAN→SENSE→NORMALIZE→GATE→HANDOFF. Outputs sense_packet aligned to whole-state intelligence across init→sense→mind→heart→judge→vault.
when_to_use: Need constitutional evidence grounding before reasoning
Classifying query type before deciding to search
Detecting ambiguity or conflict before synthesis
Updating intelligence state with bounded observations
when_not_to_use: Do not use for synthesis — that's arifos.mind
Do not use for safety evaluation — that's arifos.heart
Do not use for final decisions — that's arifos.judge
Do not use for memory storage — that's arifos.memory
Do not use bare search mode when governed mode suffices
not_job: Not a reasoning or synthesis engine

mode.description: Sensing mode: search (raw acquisition), ingest (URL fetch), compass (auto-route), atlas (resource map), time (temporal), governed (constitutional protocol — classifies before searching, ranks evidence, contains ambiguity, preserves uncertainty)

required_payload.query: string - What reality to sense (or structured_input for full contract)

optional_payload.structured_input: object - Full SenseInput contract with intent, query_frame, policy, budget, actor
optional_payload.session_context: object - Previous session context for grounding

truth_classification.truth_class: absolute_invariant | conditional_invariant | operational_principle | time_sensitive_fact | contested_framework | ambiguous_query | unknown

ambiguity.ambiguity_type: entity | timeframe | jurisdiction | definition | metric | referent | intent

conflict.conflict_type: source_disagreement | temporal_mismatch | definitional_mismatch | jurisdiction_mismatch | measurement_mismatch | version_mismatch

entities.name: string
entities.type: person | company | place | concept | law | product | document | unknown

target_claims.claim_type: definition | status | event | relationship | measurement | rule | prediction | unknown

governed_mode_v2.description: Constitutional sensing protocol — search is a tool, sensing is a governed act. Implements 8-stage pipeline aligned to whole-state intelligence.
invariants: Classify before searching: Never search by reflex
Evidence has hierarchy: Rank 1 (direct measurement) to 7 (social/unverified)
Temporal gate: Only search for live data when freshness matters
Ambiguity containment: Surface or resolve, never hide
Conflict is signal: Detect frame mismatches, don't average blindly
Uncertainty preservation: Confidence capped by humility (Ω₀)
Normalized handoff: Downstream receives structured packet, not link soup

truth_classes.absolute_invariant: Lane A — Logic, math, physics. Offline reasoning only. No search.
truth_classes.conditional_invariant: Lane B — Frame-dependent (jurisdiction, version, axioms). Context required.
truth_classes.operational_principle: Lane C — Strategy, governance. Principles + selective evidence.
truth_classes.time_sensitive_fact: Lane D — Current events, live data. Search with freshness constraints.
truth_classes.contested_framework: Lane F — Axiom-dependent, ideological. Requires explicit framing.
truth_classes.ambiguous_query: Lane G — Frame unresolved. HOLD until narrowed.
truth_classes.unknown: Lane H — Insufficient basis. HOLD for clarification.

stages: PARSE — Extract entities, intent, time-dependence, risk
CLASSIFY — Route to truth-class lane (7 classes)
HANDOFF — Route to next stage with state delta

verdict_gating.SEAL: Classified, grounded enough for lane, uncertainty bounded, handoff valid
verdict_gating.SABAR: Sensing initiated but incomplete — more evidence or narrowing needed
verdict_gating.HOLD: Ambiguity/conflict too high for safe progression in decision-critical context
verdict_gating.VOID: Invalid query, prohibited source, broken provenance, unsafe path

chatgpt_guidance.plain_english: Use this for constitutional reality grounding. It classifies your query, decides if search is needed, ranks evidence, detects ambiguity, and routes to the right downstream organ. Not just search.
ask_before_use_if: you're about to search without classifying first
the query has unclear referents or timeframe
the decision is consequential and uncertainty is high
do_not_assume: you can skip to synthesis without governance

ideal_prompt_shape.query: Who is the current CEO of OpenAI?
